_comment: Single source of truth for all ship components. Each component targets attributes defined in docs/attributes.md Section IV and ship_attributes.py. Components can only be installed at a shipyard (not yet implemented).

hulls.name: Aegis Bastion Hull
hulls.lore: Layered plasteel and sanctified ether-plates forged by the Solar Wardens. Built to hold the line against siege cannons and spiritual entropy alike.

hulls.name: Valkyrie Lattice Frame
hulls.lore: A modular honeycomb frame popular with frontier skippers. Sacrifices raw armor for agility and quick field repairs.

hulls.name: Zephyr Skysteel Chassis
hulls.lore: An ultralight skysteel lattice originally designed for atmospheric skimmers. Spacefarers prize it for evasive maneuvers and graceful drift.

hulls.name: Obsidian Reliquary Carapace
hulls.lore: A vault-hull that houses ancestral relics within obsidian nerve channels. It hums softly, soothing sentient cores and unnerving raiders.

hulls.name: Pilgrim Nomad Superstructure
hulls.lore: Self-healing lattice that adapts to harsh cosmic climates. Every Nomad hull is etched with ancestral star maps and communal lore.

engines.name: Helios Lance Drive
engines.lore: Massive solar furnaces concentrate plasma into a coherent lance of thrust. Beloved by blockade runners who live for straight-line speed.

engines.name: Whisperstream Coil
engines.lore: Phase-shifted coils bleed thrust across adjacent realities. Produces almost no wake, but temperamental under flux storms.

engines.name: Graviton Cascade Thrusters
engines.lore: A cascade of gravitic nodes folds local gravity wells to catapult the ship. Requires constant calibration by gravitic monks.

engines.name: Chronobloom Fold Engine
engines.lore: Fold petals unfurl through layered time, letting the ship bloom into new coordinates. Powerful, mesmerizing, and occasionally catastrophic.

engines.name: Drakeheart Furnace
engines.lore: Industrial fusion cores encased in dragonbone alloys. Capable of brutal thrust — if you can tame its volcanic temperament.

engines.name: Auric Flux Sails
engines.lore: Etheric sails woven from auric filaments catch solar winds and star-song. Pilots describe the sensation as 'surfing hymns of light'.

power_cores.name: Deep Core Fusion Reactor
power_cores.lore: A reliable workhorse fusion core found on half the vessels in settled space. Gets the job done without drama.

power_cores.name: Etheric Capacitor Web
power_cores.lore: A web of crystalline capacitors that stores etheric energy in supercharged lattice bonds. Extends operational range dramatically between refuels.

power_cores.name: Harmonic Power Lattice
power_cores.lore: Resonant crystals tuned to the ship's etheric signature generate power through harmonic sympathy. Eerie to maintain; extraordinary in output.

power_cores.name: Solforge Accumulator
power_cores.lore: Captures and condenses stellar radiation into a dense power reserve. Standard issue aboard Solar Warden patrol vessels.

sensors.name: Oracle Crown Array
sensors.lore: A crown of telescoping sensor masts tied into predictive heuristics. Standard issue for survey vessels seeking new frontiers.

sensors.name: Ghostlight Scrying Net
sensors.lore: Interlaced psionic fibers that read the dreams of nearby space. Provides uncanny insight, at the cost of unsettling the crew.

sensors.name: Atlas Deep-Scan Spine
sensors.lore: A spinal sensor array that maps gravitational harmonics and subspace reefs. Indispensable to exploration flotillas charting the unknown.

sensors.name: Prism Lattice Telescope
sensors.lore: A dense cluster of micro-refraction lenses that resolves star-chart data to sub-parsec precision. Favoured by cartographers mapping the void's finest details.

sensors.name: Void Echo Listener
sensors.lore: Passive receiver arrays tuned to pick up echoes bouncing off distant mass. Beloved by scouts and smugglers who prefer to observe unseen.

ai_cores.name: Aurora Conscience Matrix
ai_cores.lore: A luminous core housing ethic-coded AI mentors. Elevates decision-making and enforces graceful conduct under pressure.

ai_cores.name: Quantum Loom Core
ai_cores.lore: Entangled threads weave future possibilities into actionable insight. Requires constant pruning lest the loom spin paradoxical tapestries.

ai_cores.name: Fractal Muse Engine
ai_cores.lore: A creative computing array that generates fractal inspirations. Boosts emergent cognition and occasionally composes haunting lullabies.

ai_cores.name: Synapse Bloom Neural Matrix
ai_cores.lore: Bioluminescent neural pods extend the ship's conscious reach. They whisper in polyphonic dreams, seeking new solutions.

ai_cores.name: Obsidian Thought Vault
ai_cores.lore: An ancient cognition lattice encased in obsidian-reinforced memory crystal. Said to hold the accumulated thoughts of ten thousand commanders.

ai_cores.name: Covenant Conscience Engine
ai_cores.lore: An AI architecture governed by multilayered covenant protocols. It negotiates between crew desires and ethical imperatives with almost uncanny grace.

ai_cores.name: Reverie Drift Processor
ai_cores.lore: A processor that enters liminal dream-states between jump cycles, emerging with optimised routing and uncanny intuitions. It hums in colours.

ai_cores.name: Aegis Mind Bastion
ai_cores.lore: A fortress-mind core sealed in obsidian memory-glass. Designed to hold against intrusion, paradox, and existential doubt with equal stoicism.

ai_cores.name: Somnium Weave Core
ai_cores.lore: Woven from silence and deep-cycle processing threads, this core bridges machine logic and human intuition through shared dream architectures.
